summary: Merged the old HUD strip and header into a single sticky command bar.
Added a bridge badge placeholder driven by state.bridge_enabled and moved quick stats (open, pnl, loop) into the unified bar.
result: Dashboard server started successfully after the command-bar merge.
Top of page now uses one sticky cmdbar instead of separate HUD and header sections.
risks: HANDOFF_DASH_004.md was missing, so implementation followed TASK_DASH_004.json only.
bridge_enabled display assumes /api/state provides that field as noted in the task prerequisite; if absent, badge defaults to BRIDGE OFF.
